Pat baked ten dark green cakes.
Big dogs bite cold pale grapes.
Drop the dead dog at the pub.
Grab a cold tinnie* from the tub. (*beer)
Put the billy* back in the boot. (*teapot)
He kicked the bucket* by the gate. (*died)
Good blokes* don't boast to cops. (*men)
Please park the big bus past the gates.
Pack a brolly*, the dark clouds broke. (*umbrella)
Bite the hand that feeds* the pup. (*betray)
